'''Ironclaw''' was a [[Brown folk|brown]] [[Kentra]] who encountered a group of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]]. He was astounded that the Rebels spoke [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Bas'c]], the language of the holy prophet [[Michael Tandre|Tandre]]. He took the Rebels to see the Kentra [[King/Legends|King]] [[Jerius]].<ref name="TP" />

He was 2.2 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall and very muscular with a slow growl to his voice. He was a reserved individual and a Kentra of few words, yet he was warm-hearted and a brave warrior. It was said that he had traveled to all Kentra [[City/Legends|cities]] on [[Orellon II]].<ref name="TP" />
